zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire於1467年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親Thomas Blount53歲，母親Margaret Catherine Clifton42歲。他和Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾被列為sherriff of buckinghamshire。他去世於1508年11月在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾弗享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾弗。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Ist.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Dieter, Gunter, Hans, Jurgen, Manfred, Trud.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German ast, German Ast ‘knot (in wood), branch’, hence a nickname for a tough or awkward individual or a metonymic occupational name for a lumberjack. As a Jewish name it is artificial.
North German: occupational name, from Middle Low German arste ‘physician’, a variant of Arzt .

variants.name: Arzt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Isidor, Itzchak, Noam, Sholom.  German Elke, Franz, Alois, Hans.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a physician, German Arzt, from Middle High German arzet ‘physician’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire was born in 1467, in Durham, England, his father, Thomas Blount, was 53 and his mother, Margaret Catherine Clifton, was 42. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount. His occupation is listed as sherriff of buckinghamshire in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in November 1508, in Iver, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Iver, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire est né en 1467, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Blount, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret Catherine Clifton, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount. Sa profession de son indiquée est sherriff of buckinghamshire à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en novembre 1508, à Iver, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Iver, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire 1467 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Blount 53 und seine Mutter Margaret Catherine Clifton 42. Er hatte mit Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sherriff of buckinghamshire in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im November 1508 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Iver, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Iver, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount. La sua occupazione è indicata come sherriff of buckinghamshire nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel novembre 1508, nel Iver, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Iver, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshireが1467年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Blountは53歳，母Margaret Catherine Cliftonは42歳であった。彼はLady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blountとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでの職業はsherriff of buckinghamshireと記録されている。彼は1508年11月にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアイバーで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアイバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire(이)가 1467년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Blount(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Catherine Clifton(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 sherriff of buckinghamshire이었다. 그는 1508년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 이버에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 이버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire nasceu em 1467, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Blount, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Catherine Clifton, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount. Sua profissão aparece como sherriff of buckinghamshire em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1508, em Iver, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Iver, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Blount Ist. kg.kt , 4th baronet mountjoy, knight of the garter, knoight of bath, sheriff of buckinghamshire родился в 1467 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Blount было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Catherine Clifton, 42. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Joane de Atmore Horne , baroness mountjoy, lady blount.  Он работал по профессии sherriff of buckinghamshire в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер ноябрь 1508 г. в местности ивир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ивир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Su ocupación registrada era sherriff of buckinghamshire en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
